summary: Frontend-only regression test of the IntakeStudio refactor (792 -> 520 lines; extracted IntakeCard.jsx, IntakeHint.jsx, intakeStatus.js into /components/intake/). Exercised the full upload -> parse -> Fixer -> Create Maps flow end-to-end plus regression on the button toasts and card removal. All 7 review criteria pass, zero runtime / import / duplicate-declaration errors surfaced.
critical_code_review_comments: IntakeCard.jsx addAt() logic: when headings is empty, addAt(-1) correctly inserts at position 0, but the button handler always calls addAt(headings.length - 1). With an empty list that passes -1 so it still works — just a readability nit.

FixerPanel.indent(): maxDepth = idx === 0 ? 0 : prev.depth+1 — prevents bogus nesting but silently no-ops when user clicks Indent on row 0; consider disabling the arrow for clarity (minor UX polish, not refactor-related).

Hint cards in /intake empty state: 'Direct upload', 'The Fixer', 'OCR fallback' still lack data-testids (only zotero/dropbox/drive have them). Pre-existing gap, documented in iteration_10 — not introduced by this refactor.
test_credentials: Access gate bypassed via ?unlock=mind-mapper67 URL param (STORAGE_KEY: mindmapper.unlocked.v1).
seed_data_creation: Generated /tmp/test.pdf via reportlab (2 pages, 5 headings written; 3 detected by parsePdfHeuristic). Used for upload test; not persisted outside tmp.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified the IntakeStudio refactor into /components/intake/. Verified selectors: intake-studio, intake-zotero-btn, intake-dropbox-btn, intake-drive-btn, intake-create-maps, intake-file-input, intake-card-<id>, intake-card-toggle-<id>, intake-remove-<id>, intake-fixer-panel, intake-fixer-title, intake-fixer-list, intake-heading-<idx>, intake-heading-input-<idx>, intake-add-heading. The reportlab test PDF yielded only 3 detected headings (Introduction, Research Questions, Methods) despite 5 being written — this is parser behaviour (font-size heuristic), not a refactor bug. Note: 2 harmless 401 resource-load console messages were observed on /app (unrelated user-info endpoint under access-gate); page errors = 0.

test_results_detail.step_1_layout: intake-studio mounted; 4 top-bar testids visible; 6 hint cards rendered.
test_results_detail.step_2_upload_parse: intake-card-f_* appeared within 1s; status transitioned to PREVIEW within ~2s; fixer panel auto-expanded; fixer-title='Test Research Paper'; 3 heading-input rows.
test_results_detail.step_3_move_down: After clicking move-down on row 0, 'RENAMED H0' moved from idx 0 to idx 1 (row at idx 0 is now 'Research Questions').
test_results_detail.step_4_add_heading: intake-add-heading click grew count 3 -> 4; last row value = 'New heading'.
test_results_detail.step_5_create_maps: Button enabled; navigated to /app; sidebar reflected new map.
test_results_detail.step_6_regression_toasts: Dropbox button toast contains "Dropbox isn't wired up"; Drive button toast contains "Google Drive isn't wired up". Zotero button opens modal without crashing.
test_results_detail.step_7_console: 0 page errors; 0 'has already been declared' or 'is not defined' messages. Only 2 unrelated 401s on resource loads (pre-existing).

rca_of_the_issue: N/A — refactor is clean. All extracted modules (IntakeCard, IntakeHint, intakeStatus) import correctly, props flow through, and the Fixer interactive handlers (move/indent/rename/remove/add) still mutate parent state via onUpdateHeadings as they did pre-refactor.
